content:
Formatting
* Please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement , and format your statement properly as described in the points below.

Goal
* Please format all instances of the name "n" as [[variables]].

Input
* Please format "Line 1" in <<bold>>.

* Please format "n" as a [[variable]].

* Please delete the whole Constraints line.

Output
* Please format "Line 1" in <<bold>>.

Constraints
* Please format "n" as a [[variable]].

* Please change 1_000_000_000 to 100,000 as n never exceeds 100,000.

* Please delete the second constraint.

Stub generator
* Please change "long" to "int".

Cases
* Each test and its validator should cover the same scenario with **slightly different inputs and outputs** (except in the case where the output is 0 because the input consists of odd digits only). Please revise the cases accordingly.

* Please make sure that after the cases are revised:
  • All digits from 0 to 9 are covered in the visible tests.
  • All digits from 0 to 9 are covered in the validators.

* Please use more **random** integers instead of those consist of repeated digits or digits that form an arithmetic sequence.

Thanks.
